title: verutum
intro: Verutum is a type of plant, also known as Verbascum thapsus, commonly found in Europe and Asia, which belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. The medicinal properties of verutum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of verutum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Verutum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
